description: Three people sit around a table covered with a white cloth, engaged in conversation during a meal. On the left, a bearded man in a blue shirt leans forward. In the center, a woman in a yellow dress rests her chin on her hand, listening attentively. On the right, an older man with glasses and a dark jacket gestures while speaking. The table holds cups, a glass bottle, soft-boiled eggs, and a vase of yellow flowers. A blue-and-white tiled wall and a small window form the background.
